title: Code for: GRAD: A Two-Stage Machine Learning Algorithm Resolves the Plasma p-Tau217 Diagnostic Gray Zone for Amyloid PET Prediction
description: Two-stage diagnostic algorithm (Gatekeeper-Reflex for Alzheimer's Diagnostics) that resolves diagnostic uncertainty in plasma p-tau217 testing by combining a univariate logistic regression screen with a multi-marker random forest classifier for gray zone cases.

creators.name: Birkenbihl, Colin Jan
creators.affiliation: Harvard Medical School / Massachusetts General Hospital

creators.name: Budson, Andrew
creators.affiliation: VA Boston Healthcare System / Boston University
